creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Greg Donald from comment #0)

FreeBSD 12.x makes no claim to support RPi4B's, 13.0 does.
There are RPi4B specifics in 13 and later that were never
put back in 12.x as far as I know.

As far as I can tell this submittal should be rejected as
something like no-plan-to-support (so works-as-intended?).
